metadata.description: Sentora PYUSD is a MetaMorpho V1.1 ERC4626 vault that allocates PayPal USD deposits across Morpho Blue lending markets selected by Sentora as curator. The vault inherits the standard MetaMorpho contract surface: a 3-day timelock on owner-initiated parameter changes, a per-market supply-cap mechanism, and a guardian veto over pending submissions. As of the most recent discovery the vault holds $247.20M on Morpho Blue against an active cap envelope of 400M PYUSD spread across five markets (cbBTC, wstETH, weETH, an ETH-collateralized market, and WBTC), plus four decommissioned markets that retain only legacy positions. Pricing is provided by ten oracle adapters that route to Chainlink, RedStone, and Lido feeds.

admins.name: Sentora Owner 1/1 Multisig
admins.description: Single-signer Gnosis Safe controlling all owner-only vault parameters: fee, fee recipient, curator, allocator set, name and symbol, and the timelock and guardian submission flow. Owner-initiated changes to timelock, guardian, and per-market caps are all delay-protected for 3 days. Reaches $247.20M in vault deposits via the standard MetaMorpho permission set.

mitigations.description: Timelock can only be set in [1, 14] days

admins.name: Sentora Curator/Guardian 1/1 Multisig
admins.description: Single-signer Gnosis Safe holding both the curator role (submit and accept market caps and removals, delay-protected) and the guardian role (veto-only revoke of pending owner and curator submissions during the timelock window). Holds $247.20M in reachable capital but its non-veto reach is bounded by per-market caps; veto power is the only path that can act without a delay.

mitigations.label: Veto-only
mitigations.description: Only revokes pending owner/curator submissions during the timelock window. Cannot extract funds or initiate state changes.

mitigations.label: Veto-only
mitigations.description: Only revokes pending owner/curator submissions during the timelock window. Cannot extract funds or initiate state changes.

mitigations.label: Veto-only
mitigations.description: Only revokes pending owner/curator submissions during the timelock window. Cannot extract funds or initiate state changes.

mitigations.label: Veto-only
mitigations.description: Only revokes pending owner/curator submissions during the timelock window. Cannot extract funds or initiate state changes.

admins.name: Allocator EOA (0xC4Ba...6b31)
admins.description: Externally-owned account designated as an allocator. Can call setSupplyQueue, updateWithdrawQueue, and reallocate to move funds between already-capped markets. Cannot create new market exposure — every market it can route to must first be approved through the curator's timelocked submitCap flow.

dependencies.name: Morpho Blue
dependencies.description: Singleton lending primitive that holds every vault deposit. The vault routes PYUSD into Morpho Blue markets via supply, withdraw, and supplyCollateral calls; vault accounting reads positions back through Morpho Blue's market state. A bug in Morpho Blue would directly expose the entire $247.20M held by the vault.

dependencies.name: Chainlink BTC/USD
dependencies.description: Prices the cbBTC market (200M PYUSD cap). A stale or manipulated read drives bad-debt or under-collateralized borrows on the cbBTC collateral.

mitigations.label: Per-market cap
mitigations.description: Capital exposure under this feed is bounded by the aggregate USDC supply caps of every Morpho Blue market that consumes it.

mitigations.label: Per-market cap
mitigations.description: Capital exposure under this feed is bounded by the aggregate USDC supply caps of every Morpho Blue market that consumes it.

dependencies.name: Lido WstETHPriceFeed
dependencies.description: Tracks wstETH/stETH conversion. Feeds the wstETH market (50M PYUSD cap).

dependencies.name: Chainlink USDC/USD
dependencies.description: Quote feed used by every active market to denominate the loan-asset (PYUSD/USD via USDC proxy). Aggregates across the full 400M PYUSD active-market cap envelope: a stale read here affects every active market simultaneously.

mitigations.label: Per-market cap

dependencies.name: Chainlink WBTC/BTC
dependencies.description: WBTC peg ratio used by the WBTC market (50M PYUSD cap). De-pegging or feed failure on this single feed unbalances the WBTC borrow side without affecting the broader BTC pricing.

mitigations.label: Per-market cap
mitigations.description: Capital exposure under this feed is bounded by the aggregate USDC supply caps of every Morpho Blue market that consumes it.

dependencies.name: Morpho PublicAllocator
dependencies.description: Permissionless rebalancer that anyone can call to move liquidity between Morpho Blue markets within bounds set by the vault's allocators. Pre-registered as an allocator on this vault, so its on-chain configuration constrains the maximum reallocation it can trigger per call.

funds.name: MetaMorphoV1_1 (PYUSD)
funds.description: The vault contract itself, holding $247.20M as Morpho Blue supply positions. Depositors mint senPYUSD shares against this position; the vault's allocators can move the underlying PYUSD between approved Morpho Blue markets without an additional delay, but cannot route into markets that have not been timelocked-approved by the curator.

mitigations.description: Timelock can only be set in [1, 14] days
